message:
fix(reservation): handle edge case in conflict rate calculation

Improves getAgentConflictStats() to handle agents with zero successful
reservations but non-zero conflicts:

Previous behavior: 0 / 0 returned 0%, masking high-conflict agents

New behavior:
- reservations > 0: Normal rate = (conflicts / reservations) * 100
- reservations = 0, conflicts > 0: Returns conflicts * 100%
  Indicates severe conflict rate (all attempts failed)
- reservations = 0, conflicts = 0: Returns 0% (no activity)

This surfaces agents who consistently fail to acquire reservations
rather than hiding them with a misleading 0% conflict rate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
